[drummer]: "Yeah, that's more like it. Now, let me try recording a track and see how it sounds..."

([drummer] starts playing along with a backing track, experimenting with different rhythms and fills)

[drummer]: "Not bad, not bad. I think I need to work on my timing a bit, but overall I'm really happy with the sound of this kit. Time to start recording some tracks and sharing them with the band..."
